trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: tighten `canAccessStudent` teacher scope checks to default-deny empty scope IDs and prevent null/empty program/cohort matches, then add regression coverage for permission helpers and evidence access checks.
scope: Harden program-teacher scope matching in `functions/_lib/permissions.ts` so misconfigured/empty teacher scope IDs cannot accidentally match null program/cohort IDs, then add regression tests in `tests/permissions-access.test.mjs` and `tests/evidence-check-access.integration.test.mjs` to protect protected-evidence routes from permission drift.
changes: Hardened `canAccessStudent` teacher-scope SQL to require non-empty teacher scope IDs and non-null/non-empty group program/cohort IDs before matching, preventing empty scope IDs from accidentally matching null group fields.
Added permission-helper regression coverage proving an empty-scope program teacher cannot access a student in a cohort-only group (null program id).
Extended evidence access check integration coverage to assert 403 + audit metadata when a program teacher role exists but has an empty program scope id, preventing protected-evidence access drift.
next_actions: Continue broadening protected-evidence and permission tests for additional role/scope edge cases (teacher cohort/global, missing group membership, disabled users) as they become relevant to real workflow endpoints.
Return to Drive secret configuration and verify real upload/download behavior in Cloudflare Pages preview/production once credentials are available.
